summary: Classified the five open PRs from the hydrated live inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job is a mixed live PR inventory, instant close and low-signal closeout are disabled, and fix/merge/raise_pr are blocked. No security-sensitive refs were detected.

actions.reason: Focused contributor bug fix with maintainer/author follow-up and bot-requested changes; requires maintainer or author action outside this close-only inventory job.
Keep open as an independent PR pending proof/technical review; no safe close, merge, or fix action is available in this job.
Related follow-up to the merged #74543 area, but not a duplicate or already covered closeout; keep open for maintainer review/proof reconciliation.
Maintainer-owned or maintainer-signaled focused bug fix with active user follow-up and failed proof/bot findings; requires maintainer judgment outside this non-merge, non-fix job.
Broad feature/API PR with failing proof/type check and compatibility/session-state risk needs maintainer technical/product review; no autonomous close, merge, or fix path is permitted.

needs_human: #75157: maintainer/author follow-up required because the hydrated maintainer comment requests rebase for Dependency Guard and the latest ClawSweeper bot review says changes are needed before merge.
#75427: maintainer judgment required because this focused Signal fix has active user confirmation but failed Real behavior proof and latest ClawSweeper findings before merge.
#75554: maintainer technical/product review required because the PR is broad, proof and type checks are failing, and the job cannot fix or merge it.
